zh.lifeSummary: 當Katherine Brydges於1497年出生在英國格盧斯特斯爾可利時，她的父親Sir Gilles Brydges35歲，母親Isabella Baynham22歲。她於大約1509年與Leonard Poole Esq在英國格盧斯特斯爾可利結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1556年在英國格盧斯特斯爾享年59歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭倫敦易斯林頓聖 瑪麗 亞德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Katherine Brydges于1497年出生在英国格盧斯特斯爾可利时，她的父亲Sir Gilles Brydges35岁，母亲Isabella Baynham22岁。她于大约1509年与Leonard Poole Esq在英国格盧斯特斯爾可利结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1556年在英国格盧斯特斯爾享年59岁，埋葬在英国英格兰倫敦易斯林頓聖 瑪麗 亞德。

nameMeanings.name: Brydges
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Bridges
meanings: English: variant of Bridge . The -s generally represents the genitive case, but may occasionally be a plural. In some cases this name denoted someone from the Flemish city of Bruges (Brugge) in Belgium, meaning ‘bridges’, which had extensive trading links with England in the Middle Ages.

nameMeanings.name: Katherine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

en.lifeSummary: When Katherine Brydges was born in 1497, in Coberley, Gloucestershire, England, her father, Sir Gilles Brydges, was 35 and her mother, Isabella Baynham, was 22. She married Leonard Poole Esq about 1509, in Coberley, Gloucestershire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. She died in 1556, in Gloucestershire, England, at the age of 59, and was buried in Saint Mary Churchyard, Islington, London, England, United Kingdom.

fr.Saint Mary Churchyard, Islington, London: Saint Mary Churchyard, Islington, Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Katherine Brydges est née en 1497, à Coberley, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Gilles Brydges, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Isabella Baynham, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé Leonard Poole Esq environ 1509, à Coberley, Gloucestershire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1556, à Gloucestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 59 ans, et a été enterrée à Saint Mary Churchyard, Islington, Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.Saint Mary Churchyard, Islington, London: Saint Mary Churchyard, Islington, London, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Katherine Brydges 1497 in Coberley, Gloucestershire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Gilles Brydges 35 und ihre Mutter Isabella Baynham 22. Sie hat um 1509 in Coberley, Gloucestershire, England Leonard Poole Esq geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1556 im Alter von 59 Jahren in Gloucestershire, England und wurde in Saint Mary Churchyard, Islington, London, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Katherine Brydges è nata il nel 1497 nel Coberley, Gloucestershire, England, sua padre, Sir Gilles Brydges, aveva 35 anni e sua madre, Isabella Baynham, aveva 22 anni. Lei sposato Leonard Poole Esq circa 1509, nel Coberley, Gloucestershire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1556, nel Gloucestershire, England, all'età di 59 anni, e fu sepolta a Saint Mary Churchyard, Islington, London, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Katherine Brydgesが1497年にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアコバーリーで生まれた時，父Sir Gilles Brydgesは35歳，母Isabella Baynhamは22歳であった。約1509年にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアコバーリーでLeonard Poole Esqと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1556年にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアで59歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスロンドンイスリントンサイント マリー チャーチヤルドにて埋葬された。

ko.Saint Mary Churchyard, Islington, London: 영국 잉글랜드 런던 이슬링턴 세인트 메리 c후르c히아어드
ko.lifeSummary: Katherine Brydges(이)가 1497년 영국 그루스스터실르 컵를리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Gilles Brydges(은)는 35세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabella Baynham(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 대략 1509년 영국 그루스스터실르 컵를리에서 Leonard Poole Esq(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1556년 영국 그루스스터실르에서 59세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 런던 이슬링턴 세인트 메리 c후르c히아어드에 묻혔다.

pt.Saint Mary Churchyard, Islington, London: Saint Mary Churchyard, Islington, London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Katherine Brydges nasceu em 1497, em Coberley, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Gilles Brydges, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Isabella Baynham, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com Leonard Poole Esq aproximadamente 1509, em Coberley, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1556, em Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, com 59 anos, e foi sepultada em Saint Mary Churchyard, Islington, London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Saint Mary Churchyard, Islington, London: сеинт мэри чурчярд, ислингтон, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Katherine Brydges родилась в 1497 г. в местности кобирли, глоусестиршир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Gilles Brydges было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabella Baynham, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Leonard Poole Esq около 1509 г. в местности кобирли, глоусестиршир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1556 г. в местности глоусестиршир, Англия в возрасте 59 лет и была похоронена в местности сеинт мэри чурчярд, ислингтон, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Katherine Brydges nació en 1497, en Coberley, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Gilles Brydges, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Isabella Baynham, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Leonard Poole Esq aproximadamente 1509, en Coberley, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1556, en Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 59 años, y fue sepultada en Saint Mary Churchyard, Islington, London, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
